outlier_sessions.description: Four sessions excluded from Table 1. Exclusion criterion is magnitude-based and independent of sign result.
outlier_sessions.exclusion_criterion: Absolute delta mean magnitude more than 3 SD below trial block mean, confirmed by post-session positioning review. Trial block defined as contiguous run of 5 sessions with same material in single sitting.

sessions.exclusion_reason: Photograph partially outside detection region. 6.1 SD below block mean in absolute magnitude.
sessions.threshold_analysis: At deployed threshold 800: SV (516.43) < 800 and sign positive — session would be classified LIVE. Exclusion valid on positioning grounds independently of threshold.

sessions.exclusion_reason: Anomalous SV drop mid-block. Photograph shifted position.
First run; screen not yet in position.
sessions.threshold_analysis: At threshold 800: SV (2839) > 800 — correctly rejected by SV criterion despite positive sign.

warmup_characterization.conclusion: At threshold 800, insufficient warmup does not produce false acceptance.
